assignment.intendedUsers: Midwest Commercial Lending Corp and its successors
assignment.scopeOfWork: Complete appraisal of a 12-unit apartment building using all three approaches to value. Sales Comparison, Income Capitalization, and Cost Approach required.

subject.address: 1400 South Grand Avenue East, Springfield, IL 62703
subject.legalDescription: Lot 7, Block 12, Grand Avenue Industrial & Commercial Addition, as recorded in Plat Book 8, Page 92, Sangamon County Recorder's Office

improvements.constructionType: Wood frame on concrete slab with crawl space
improvements.amenities: On-site laundry (2 buildings), individual storage units, playground area
improvements.hvac: Individual gas forced-air furnaces and central A/C per unit
improvements.condition: Average — Functional with typical deferred maintenance for age. Common areas updated 2021. Parking lot resurfaced 2022.
improvements.quality: Average quality, typical for suburban garden-style apartments in this market

neighborhood.name: South Grand / Medical District Area
neighborhood.location: South-central Springfield, adjacent to SIU School of Medicine and Memorial Medical Center
neighborhood.predominantUse: Mixed residential (single-family and multi-family) with commercial along arterials
neighborhood.employmentProximity: Walking distance to Memorial Medical Center, SIU-SOM; 2 miles to State Capitol complex
